name: Avinav Gupta
tagline: Full-Stack Developer | AI Specialist | Cybersecurity Enthusiast
welcomeMessage: Welcome to AvinPortfolio v1.0.0! Type "help" to start.
about: Hi, I'm Abhinav Gupta — a full-stack developer, automation enthusiast, and AI tinkerer passionate about building things that work in the real world.
aboutParagraphs: I'm Abhinav Gupta — a full-stack developer, automation enthusiast, and AI tinkerer. Also known online as Avinrique, I blend deep technical skills with hands-on creativity. My core stack includes JavaScript (Node.js), Python, Java, and Bash, and I'm comfortable across both Linux-based systems and cloud platforms like AWS and Azure.

I've architected and deployed real-world systems ranging from custom e-commerce platforms and AI-proctored testing tools to ESP32-powered assistant bots and sensor-driven smart displays. I'm constantly exploring the cutting edge — whether it's fine-tuning LLM prompts, building agentic automation systems, or experimenting with embedded hardware and robotics.
My work is driven by curiosity, a hacker mindset, and a strong belief in building things that work — not just on paper, but in the real world. I don't just code; I ship.

skills.AI: LLMs (Gemini, GPT), Deep Learning, TensorFlow, PyTorch, TTS/STT
skills.Cybersecurity: Penetration Testing, Network Security, Shell Scripting
skills.Hardware: ESP32, Raspberry Pi, Arduino, ATtiny85, IoT, Robotics

projectCards.title: Prepzer0 – AI-Proctored Testing Platform
projectCards.description: A low-cost online placement testing system with AI-based proctoring (face, phone detection) and an admin dashboard for analytics.

projectCards.description: A space-themed Arduino project transmitting environmental sensor data to a ground station, complete with a mission control UI.

projectCards.description: A lightweight, Linux-based OS designed to automate tasks and streamline workflow with AI-based natural language control and display extension features.

projectCards.description: A Liquid-3-inspired system using DFRobot sensors (CO2, PM2.5, O2) with display + ad modules to raise awareness on air quality.
